# Repair Type Sequence

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:8e7d37690be266473425c4c06979f3c361d035030453f337cd7ffe0070481a53

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module introduces a sequence to the repair type that will be influence the numbering in the repair orders.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

methods.name: odoo.addons.repair_type_sequence.models.repair_type.RepairType._compute_seq_number_next
documentation:
Compute 'sequence_number_next' according to the current sequence
in use, an ir.sequence or an ir.sequence.date_range.

methods.name: odoo.addons.repair_type_sequence.models.repair_type.RepairType._inverse_seq_number_next
documentation: Inverse 'sequence_number_next' to edit the current sequence next number
